creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
cy          2009-06-09 04:16:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/krb5-17     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    security/krb5-17/files README.FreeBSD patch-ac patch-ad 
                           patch-ae patch-af patch-ai patch-aj 
                           patch-appl::bsd::Makefile.in 
                           patch-appl::bsd::klogind.M 
                           patch-appl::gssftp::ftp::ftp_var.h 
                           patch-appl::telnet::telnetd::Makefile.in 
                           patch-appl::telnet::telnetd::telnetd.8 
                           patch-appl::telnet::telnetd::utility.c

                           patch-lib-rpc-svc_tcp.c 
                           patch-lib::gssapi::krb5::import_name.c 
                           patch-plugins-preauth-pkinit-Makefile.in 
  Log:
  This forced commit documents the repocopy of security/krb5 to security/krb5-17
  in preparation for inclusion of KRB5 1.7 in the ports collection.
  
  PR:             135290
